name: Bluffview Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bluffview Park in La Crosse, WI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Dahl Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Dahl Family YMCA in La Crosse, WI! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: First Free Church
description: Come play pickleball at First Free Church in Onalaska, WI! There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Holmen Area Community Center
description: Holmen Area Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Holmen, WI. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Oak Park
description: Oak Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Onalaska, WI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Remington Hills Park
description: Remington Hills Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Holmen, WI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: R.W. HOUSER FAMILY YMCA
description: R.W. HOUSER FAMILY YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Onalaska, WI. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: The Blue Zone
description: The Blue Zone is a place to play pickleball in La Crosse, WI. There are 17 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, trainers or lessons, restrooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights.

name: Trane Park
description: Trane Park is a place to play pickleball in La Crosse, WI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: West Salem Village Park
description: West Salem Village Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in West Salem, WI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
